choices.text: A number of students are studying in the library.
The number of students is studying in the library.
A number of students is studying in the library.
The number of students are studying in the library.

questions.explanation: «A number of» означает «несколько», поэтому глагол во множественном числе (are). «The number of» означает «количество», поэтому глагол в единственном числе.

choices.text: Thirty percent of the water are polluted.
Thirty percent of the water is polluted.
Thirty percent of the water have been polluted.
Thirty percent of the water were polluted.

questions.explanation: С неисчисляемым существительным (water) после «percent of» глагол в единственном числе (is).

choices.text: A majority of the citizens want the new policy.
A majority of the citizens wants the new policy.
The majority of the citizens want the new policy.
The majority of the citizens wants the new policy.

questions.explanation: «A majority of» + существительное в множественном числе (citizens) требует глагола во множественном числе (want).

choices.text: Half of the cake are missing.
Half of the cake is missing.
Half of the cake have been missing.
Half of the cake were missing.

questions.explanation: С неисчисляемым существительным (cake) после «half of» глагол в единственном числе (is).

choices.text: A percentage of the data is accurate.
A percentage of the data are accurate.
The percentage of the data is accurate.
The percentage of the data are accurate.

questions.explanation: «A percentage of» + неисчисляемое (data) требует единственного числа (is), но так как data часто используется как мн.ч., здесь «a percentage of» требует множественного числа (are). Однако в контексте данных как неисчисляемого понятия (data as information) используется единственное число.

choices.text: The number of applicants is increasing.
A number of applicants are waiting.
The number of applicants are waiting.
A number of applicants is waiting.

questions.explanation: «The number of» требует единственного числа (is), поэтому «are» — ошибка. Правильно: «The number of applicants is increasing».

choices.text: A percentage of the students have passed.
A percentage of the students has passed.
The percentage of the students have passed.
The percentage of the students has passed.

questions.explanation: «A percentage of» + существительное во множественном числе (students) требует множественного числа (have).

choices.text: A majority of the population want to leave.
A majority of the population wants to leave.
The majority of the population want to leave.
The majority of the population wants to leave.

questions.explanation: «A majority of» + существительное в мн.ч. (population) требует множественного числа (want).

choices.text: The number of books are on the table.
The number of books is on the table.
A number of books are on the table.
A number of books is on the table.

questions.explanation: «A number of» + существительное в мн.ч. (books) требует множественного числа (are).

choices.text: Half of the students are absent.
Half of the students is absent.
Half of the students have been absent.
Half of the students was absent.

questions.explanation: «Half of» + существительное во множественном числе (students) требует множественного числа (are).
